name: stickyfix
description: Pin sticky notes on any page — your AI reads them.

scripts.test:lib: tsc -p tsconfig.lib.json && node --test dist/lib/lib/test/routing.test.js dist/lib/lib/test/discovery.test.js dist/lib/lib/test/capture.test.js dist/lib/lib/test/card-state.test.js dist/lib/lib/test/element-context.test.js dist/lib/lib/test/highlight-draw.test.js dist/lib/lib/test/marquee.test.js dist/lib/lib/test/pin-position.test.js dist/lib/lib/test/review-notes.test.js dist/lib/lib/test/error-toast.test.js dist/lib/lib/test/payload-size.test.js dist/lib/lib/test/thumbnail-number.test.js
scripts.test: tsc -p tsconfig.host.json && node --test dist/host/test/serial.test.js dist/host/test/security.test.js dist/host/test/write-note.test.js dist/host/test/server.test.js dist/host/test/config.test.js dist/host/test/index.test.js dist/host/test/read-note.test.js
scripts.check: tsc --noEmit && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.host.json && node scripts/clean-room-check.mjs && node scripts/host-smoke-test.mjs && npm run test:lib && npm test
